included.text: Daily breakfast and regional dinner meals
Local experienced driver and sightseeing guide
Private air-conditioned transfers for the entire route

itinerary.title: Arrival in Bangalore & Garden City Sightseeing
itinerary.description: Arrive in Bangalore and check into your hotel. In the afternoon, visit Bangalore Palace and stroll through the historic Lalbagh Botanical Gardens.

itinerary.title: Mysore Royal Palace & Brindavan Gardens
itinerary.description: Drive to Mysore. Visit the Chamundi Hills and the grand, illuminated Mysore Palace. In the evening, enjoy the musical fountain show at Brindavan Gardens.

itinerary.title: Travel to Coorg & Bylakuppe Namdroling Monastery
itinerary.description: Travel to the misty hills of Coorg. En route, visit the Namdroling Monastery (Golden Temple) in Bylakuppe. Check into your valley resort.

itinerary.title: Coorg Plantation Tour, Dubare Elephant Camp & Waterfalls
itinerary.description: Interact with elephants at Dubare Elephant Camp, witness the scenic beauty of Abbey Falls, and take a guided walk through a fragrant coffee plantation.

itinerary.title: Transfer to Hyderabad & Evening Lake Visit
itinerary.description: Travel to the historic city of Hyderabad. In the evening, enjoy a boat ride on Hussain Sagar Lake to see the towering monolithic Buddha statue.

title: Bangalore, Hyderabad & Coorg: Heritage Cities & Coffee Estates
description: A premium tour combining Bangalore's urban parks, Hyderabad's rich Nizami heritage (Charminar, Golconda Fort), the royal grandeur of Mysore Palace, and the peaceful, misty coffee estates of Coorg.
highlights: Tour Hyderabad's historic Charminar and Golconda Fort
Explore Coorg's Dubare Elephant Camp and Abbey Falls
Visit Mysore Palace and Bangalore's Lalbagh Botanical Gardens
